reference.title: Adding Pipeline Steps: Pre/Post Preprocess and Legacy Hooks
reference.shortdesc: How to inject custom Ant targets before or after preprocessing, and when legacy step-specific hooks are appropriate.

section.title: The stable approach: run before/after preprocessing
section.p: Then in your Ant file (e.g., integrator.xml), define a target that runs before preprocess.

section.title: Legacy step hooks: when you must
section.p: The official docs list many depend.preprocess.<step>.pre extension points for legacy preprocess stages.
Use them only for scenarios like:

ul.li: injecting a normalization step before conref expansion
generating intermediate metadata files consumed by later steps
strict validations that must happen before chunk decisions

section.title: Map-first (preprocess2) caveat
section.p: Step-specific legacy hooks are not available in preprocess2. The map-first documentation and preprocessing extension point docs both highlight this constraint.
